summary: Iteration 70: Shadow/Experimental Strategy Tracking UI COMPLETE. All frontend features verified - Sniper page shadow summary card, Quant Lab page with full shadow monitoring dashboard. All data-testid attributes present, indigo accent styling differentiates shadow from live metrics, auto-refresh working at 8-second intervals.

sniper_page_shadow_summary: Shadow summary card visible with data-testid='shadow-summary-card' - PASS
Shadow summary shows Agreement rate (93.2%) - PASS
Shadow summary shows Would-Trade count (2815+) - PASS
Shadow summary shows Open count (31+) - PASS
Shadow summary shows Closed count (35+) - PASS
Shadow summary shows Hyp. PnL (+$1.44) - PASS
Quant Lab link present with data-testid='shadow-open-lab' - PASS
Clicking Quant Lab link navigates to /quant-lab - PASS
quant_lab_navigation: Quant Lab nav item in sidebar with data-testid='nav-quant lab' - PASS
Quant Lab page loads with data-testid='quant-lab-page' - PASS
quant_lab_shadow_banner: Banner text 'No live execution — all positions and PnL are hypothetical' visible - PASS
quant_lab_tables: section-shadow-open - Open Hypothetical Positions section - PASS
shadow-open-table with columns: Market, Asset, Side, Entry, Mark, Unrl PnL, EV Ratio, Stoikov Edge, Opened - PASS
section-shadow-closed - Closed Hypothetical Trades section - PASS
shadow-evals-table with columns: Time, Market, Asset, Live, Shadow, EV Gap, Res. Price, Stoikov, Raw Edge - PASS
quant_lab_styling: Shadow banner uses indigo styling (border-indigo-500/40, bg-indigo-950/20) - PASS
Shadow metric cards use indigo accent (bg-indigo-950/20, border-indigo-500/20) - PASS
Live metric cards use standard styling (bg-zinc-900/60, border-zinc-800) - PASS
220+ elements with indigo text styling (text-indigo-300, text-indigo-400) - PASS
quant_lab_auto_refresh: Metrics update without page reload (Live Trades, Shadow Trades, Evaluations count) - PASS

shadow_summary_on_sniper.description: Compact shadow summary card on Crypto Sniper page

quant_lab_page.description: Full shadow monitoring dashboard accessible from left nav
sections: Shadow Banner (SHADOW ONLY / NO LIVE EXECUTION)
Shadow Config (EV-Gap, Stoikov, Gamma, Inventory Decay)

indigo_accent_styling.description: Indigo (#818cf8, indigo-400) used for shadow elements to differentiate from live trading

auto_refresh.description: Quant Lab page auto-refreshes data every 8 seconds

critical_code_review_comments: QuantLab.jsx: Well-structured with 4 parallel API calls on refresh (report, evaluations, positions, closed)
Sniper.jsx: Shadow data fetch isolated from main polling cycle (10s interval vs 6s for main data)
Shadow banner clearly labeled 'SHADOW ONLY' with animated pulse indicator
All shadow metrics differentiated with indigo accent color as specified
Tables use consistent DataTable component with proper test IDs

success_rate.backend: N/A (not tested this iteration - validated in iteration_69)

seed_data_creation: None - tested with live shadow system data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 validated the shadow/experimental strategy tracking UI. Key points: (1) Sniper page at /sniper has shadow summary card with Agreement rate, Would-Trade count, Open/Closed counts, Hyp. PnL, and link to Quant Lab, (2) Quant Lab page at /quant-lab accessible via sidebar nav and shadow summary link, contains full shadow monitoring dashboard with metrics, config, and 3 tables (open positions, closed trades, evaluations), (3) All shadow elements use indigo accent color (#818cf8) to differentiate from live trading elements, (4) Auto-refresh every 8 seconds keeps data current without losing scroll position.
